China.reason: Export controls, geopolitical tension, trade war exposure

Taiwan.reason: TSMC concentration risk, geopolitical tension with China

South Korea.reason: Samsung/SK Hynix concentration, North Korea proximity

Japan.reason: Stable democracy, allied nation, diversified fabs

France.reason: EU member, STMicroelectronics HQ and fabs

Netherlands.reason: ASML monopoly on EUV, stable EU member

Israel.reason: Intel/Tower Semiconductor presence, regional conflict risk
